---
title: Contributing to BDM
---

The BDM is open to community discussions, and we welcome all forms of contribution. Here are some ways you can help:

- Contributing **documentation** such as tutorials, guides, and examples to the [BDM repo](https://github.com/behaverse/data-model).
- Contributing **code** to the [Behaverse repos](https://github.com/behaverse). See the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/behaverse/data-model/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) for details, or open an [issue](https://github.com/behaverse/data-model/issues) or [discussion](https://github.com/orgs/behaverse/discussions) to propose changes.
- Contributing **data**. We are always looking for datasets to include in our list of BDM-compatible datasets. If you have a dataset that you would like to contribute or reformat into BDM, please contact us.
